title: Ai+ Nova 2 Ultra 5G launched with customizable RGB ring light and 6,000mAh battery for just INR 16,999
summary: Advertisement The Ai+ Nova 2 Ultra 5G is launched in India, continuing the Nova 2 series that balances premium vibes without paying the premium price. With customized RGB ring lights, massive battery, AMOLED display, and more, the Ai+ Nova 2 Ultra has checked a few boxes that are found on flagship devices, all while at a budget price. In this article, I will talk about its features, availability,
content:
Advertisement The Ai+ Nova 2 Ultra 5G is launched in India, continuing the Nova 2 series that balances premium vibes without paying the premium price. With customized RGB ring lights, massive battery, AMOLED display, and more, the Ai+ Nova 2 Ultra has checked a few boxes that are found on flagship devices, all while at a budget price. In this article, I will talk about its features, availability, and expected price in Nepal. Ai+ Nova 2 Ultra 5G Overview: Design and Display Talking about the design, the Ai+ Nova 2 Ultra 5G measures 8.89mm thick and weighs around 200g. The phone comes with a durable plastic body and has an IP68 rating for dust and water resistance. It also features a customizable RGB ring light on the back that reacts to notifications and calls, giving you the “premium gaming” or “Nothing” phone vibes compared to its predecessor, the Nova 5G. You can find the phone in Blue, Green, Purple, Black, and Red color options. Moving on to the display, the Ai+ Nova 2 Ultra 5G features a 6.78-inch AMOLED panel with 1.5K resolution and a faster 144Hz refresh rate that delivers clear images and a smooth scrolling experience. The screen is also bright enough that can hit 1800 nits (HBM) of high brightness and offer up to 2500 nits of peak brightness. Which means the screen is excellent to use even under intense sunlight. It also has an in-display fingerprint scanner for security. Camera and Battery In terms of the camera, the Ai+ Nova 2 Ultra 5G has been upgraded a lot compared to its predecessor. It has a dual-camera setup, where you get a 50MP Sony IMX752 sensor with OIS and an 8MP ultra-wide lens on the back. For selfies, it has a 13MP camera with fixed focus. The back camera supports up to 4k video recording at 30fps and for the front, it supports 1080p at 30fps. For battery, the Ai+ Nova 2 Ultra 5 packs a massive 6000mAh lithium-polymer battery with 33W wired charging. You may also like: Performance and Software Under the hood, the Ai+ Nova 2 Ultra 5G is powered by MediaTek Dimensity 7400, which is manufactured on a 4nm node to handle demanding tasks, gaming, and content creation. Additionally, the phone has a vapor chamber cooling system to keep the temperature low during intensive tasks like gaming and multitasking. Because of this, you won’t experience thermal throttling and will enjoy smooth gameplay. The Ai+ Nova 2 is configured with 6/8GB of RAM with 128GB UFS 2.2 storage, which is expandable up to 1TB. On the software side, the Ai+ Nova 2 Ultra boots NxtQuantum OS based on Android 16, where you can expect 1 year of software updates and 2 years of security patches. Ai+ Nova 2 Ultra 5G Specifications: Design, build: Plastic build, IP68 dust and water resistant Display: 6.78-inch AMOLED, 1.5K resolution, 144Hz, HDR, 2500 nits (peak) Chipset: MediaTek Dimensity 7400 (4nm) Memory: 6/8GB RAM, 128GB UFS 2.2 storage (expandable up to 1TB) Software & UI: nxtQ OS based on Android 16 (with 1 major update) Rear Camera: Dual – 50MP Sony IMX752 senor with OIS, 8MP ultrawide ultrawide Front Camera: 13MP Security: In-display fingerprint scanner Connectivity: Dual-SIM (Nano), Wi-Fi 6 (dual-band), Bluetooth 5.4, GPS / GLONASS / GALILEO/BDS, USB-C 2.0 Sensors: Accelerometer, gyroscope, proximity sensor, compass Battery: 6,000 mAh with 33W wired charging Ai+ Nova 2 Ultra 5G Availability and Price in Nepal The A+ Nova 2 Ultra 5G will be available in India starting from April 17, with the starting price of INR 16,999 for the 6/128GB and INR 18,999 for the 8/128GB variant. While the phone is yet to be available in the Nepali market, you can expect the Ai+ Nova 2 Ultra 5G price in Nepal to be around NPR 24,099 (converted price) for the base model. Ai+ Nova 2 Ultra 5G Price in India (Official) Price in Nepal (Converted) 6/128GB INR 16,999 NPR 27,299 8/128GB INR 18,999 NPR 30,399

The Ai+ Nova 2 Ultra 5G is launched in India, continuing the Nova 2 series that balances premium vibes without paying the premium price. With customized RGB ring lights, massive battery, AMOLED display, and more, the Ai+ Nova 2 Ultra has checked a few boxes that are found on flagship devices, all while at a budget price. In this article, I will talk about its features, availability, and expected price in Nepal.

Talking about the design, the Ai+ Nova 2 Ultra 5G measures 8.89mm thick and weighs around 200g. The phone comes with a durable plastic body and has an IP68 rating for dust and water resistance. It also features a customizable RGB ring light on the back that reacts to notifications and calls, giving you the “premium gaming” or “Nothing” phone vibes compared to its predecessor, the Nova 5G. You can find the phone in Blue, Green, Purple, Black, and Red color options.

Moving on to the display, the Ai+ Nova 2 Ultra 5G features a 6.78-inch AMOLED panel with 1.5K resolution and a faster 144Hz refresh rate that delivers clear images and a smooth scrolling experience. The screen is also bright enough that can hit 1800 nits (HBM) of high brightness and offer up to 2500 nits of peak brightness. Which means the screen is excellent to use even under intense sunlight. It also has an in-display fingerprint scanner for security.

In terms of the camera, the Ai+ Nova 2 Ultra 5G has been upgraded a lot compared to its predecessor. It has a dual-camera setup, where you get a 50MP Sony IMX752 sensor with OIS and an 8MP ultra-wide lens on the back. For selfies, it has a 13MP camera with fixed focus. The back camera supports up to 4k video recording at 30fps and for the front, it supports 1080p at 30fps.

For battery, the Ai+ Nova 2 Ultra 5 packs a massive 6000mAh lithium-polymer battery with 33W wired charging.

You may also like:

Under the hood, the Ai+ Nova 2 Ultra 5G is powered by MediaTek Dimensity 7400, which is manufactured on a 4nm node to handle demanding tasks, gaming, and content creation. Additionally, the phone has a vapor chamber cooling system to keep the temperature low during intensive tasks like gaming and multitasking. Because of this, you won’t experience thermal throttling and will enjoy smooth gameplay. The Ai+ Nova 2 is configured with 6/8GB of RAM with 128GB UFS 2.2 storage, which is expandable up to 1TB.

On the software side, the Ai+ Nova 2 Ultra boots NxtQuantum OS based on Android 16, where you can expect 1 year of software updates and 2 years of security patches.

The A+ Nova 2 Ultra 5G will be available in India starting from April 17, with the starting price of INR 16,999 for the 6/128GB and INR 18,999 for the 8/128GB variant. While the phone is yet to be available in the Nepali market, you can expect the Ai+ Nova 2 Ultra 5G price in Nepal to be around NPR 24,099 (converted price) for the base model.
